common.tagline: Find the best home tutor online

hero.title: The best home tutor, online
hero.subtitle: Find a qualified teacher for your child. Private lessons, group classes, exam preparation — wherever you are in Ivory Coast.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our catalog of verified teachers by subject, grade, and city.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose a time slot and pay with Orange Money or Wave.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your child joins the video class from your phone or tablet.

features.title: Why EcoleVersity?
features.verifiedDesc: Every teacher is verified: national ID, diploma, and introduction video.
features.mobileDesc: Designed for your phone. Works even with a slow connection.
features.paymentDesc: Pay with Orange Money or Wave. Teachers are paid every week.
features.safeDesc: All communications stay on the platform. Your children are protected.

cta.title: Get started now
cta.subtitle: Join EcoleVersity and give your child the best academic support.

auth.otpSent: A code has been sent to {destination}

teacher.welcomeDesc: Earn money teaching online. Thousands of parents are looking for teachers like you.

teacher.verificationDesc: For student safety, we verify every teacher's identity.
teacher.firstCourseDesc: We'll guide you step by step.
teacher.jitsiDesc: Make sure your camera and microphone are working.
teacher.payoutDesc: Enter your Orange Money or Wave number to receive payments.
